personal.preferred_title: Senior Data Quality / ETL Test Engineer | SQL / Data Migration Validation

summary: Senior Data Engineer with 20+ years of enterprise experience across SQL engineering, ETL/data pipeline validation, data migration, dimensional data structures, reporting datasets, and production data reliability. Strong background writing complex SQL, validating source-to-target data movement, troubleshooting data quality issues, documenting data flows, and supporting business-critical reporting in regulated financial environments. Experienced partnering with analytics, architecture, operations, and engineering teams to improve data trust, defect resolution, and repeatable delivery practices.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Built and supported Python/Pandas ETL pipelines that ingested and normalized P95 telemetry from 6,000+ endpoints, replacing manual reporting flows with repeatable, validated data processing.
Designed Oracle schemas and historical retention structures for analytics and forecasting datasets, applying SQL, partitioning concepts, data modeling, and performance-aware query patterns.
Performed data cleansing, reconciliation, and quality checks across monitoring and capacity data feeds to support trusted executive dashboards and recurring reporting cycles.
Troubleshot production data issues across TrueSight, CA Wily, AppDynamics, Oracle, and reporting layers, partnering with technical teams to identify root causes and restore reliable data delivery.
Documented pipeline logic, reporting assumptions, data sources, operational procedures, and validation outputs so analytics and operations stakeholders could understand and trust the data products.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Led the FAST project, data-mining real-user and synthetic monitoring metrics to identify performance patterns and produce actionable reporting for engineering teams.
Validated monitoring data and reporting outputs during Dynatrace AppMon/Synthetics upgrades, helping maintain production visibility through cutover activities.
Integrated load-test and APM data sources to support root-cause analysis, regression evaluation, and performance reporting for critical hospitality systems.

experience.title: SME for CA APM (Senior Consultant)
bullets: Built Perl and Korn Shell extraction scripts for automated performance reporting, reducing manual export work and improving repeatability of operational analytics.
Designed dashboards, alerts, thresholds, and SLA-style monitoring modules used to validate application health and surface production issues earlier.
Created technical documentation and delivered training materials that standardized monitoring, reporting, and troubleshooting practices across large enterprise environments.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Led migration of a high-throughput shopping engine from 200+ MySQL nodes to a 6-node Oracle RAC cluster while preserving transaction correctness and query performance.
Built C++/OCCI/OCI validation and testing utilities to compare migration results across large transaction datasets and confirm source-to-target accuracy.
Automated schema conversion and data validation workflows used throughout phased migration cutover and post-migration verification.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

skills.SQL & Data Validation: Advanced SQL, Oracle SQL, PL/SQL, complex joins, source-to-target validation, reconciliation, duplicate checks, data integrity checks, data profiling, root-cause analysis
skills.ETL / Data Quality Testing: ETL testing, data migration validation, regression testing concepts, negative test scenarios, performance/volume validation concepts, defect triage, requirements-to-test traceability
skills.Data Engineering: Python, Pandas, PySpark, ETL/ELT pipelines, data cleansing, data transformation, data modeling, dimensional modeling concepts, data warehousing, reporting datasets
skills.Cloud & Warehousing: AWS S3, AWS Glue, Athena, Amazon Redshift concepts, Oracle, MySQL, PostgreSQL, MPP/cloud warehouse concepts, Parquet, JSON, XML
skills.Reliability & Documentation: Production support, monitoring, alerting, incident response, runbooks, Agile/Scrum, Git, technical documentation, data-flow documentation, stakeholder communication
skills.Analytics & Reporting: Executive reporting, operational dashboards, telemetry analytics, data quality reporting, Streamlit, matplotlib, seaborn, plotly, Power BI/Tableau concepts

projects.name: HorizonScale — AI Capacity Forecasting Engine
projects.description: Built a Python/PySpark forecasting and analytics pipeline that transformed telemetry into validated capacity datasets, reporting views, and operational insights for infrastructure planning.

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform (AWS)
projects.description: Designed an AWS S3/Glue/Athena data platform pattern with structured ingestion, Parquet optimization, metadata/catalog concepts, and quality gates for analytics-ready datasets.

projects.name: AI-Powered Job Search Pipeline
projects.description: Built an automated Python pipeline with semantic duplicate detection, structured artifacts, quality gates, and application tracking, reinforcing repeatable validation and documentation practices.
